chunks.text: Course: EE 25 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 25. What Electrical Engineers Do--Feedback from Recent Graduates Catalog Description: A Berkeley Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences degree opens the door to many opportunities, but what exactly are they? Graduation is only a few years away and it's not too early to find out. In this seminar students will hear from practicing engineers who recently graduated. What are they working on? Are they working in a team? What do they wish they had learned better? How did they find their jobs? Units: 1 Also Offered As: ELENG 25 Formats: Spring: 1 hour of lecture per week Fall: 1 hour of lecture per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
